passages.passage_text: Step II: Access at Go for to Though By easy To Step III: Access at By easy for Go to Though By easy To Step IV: Access at By easy Go for to Though To Step V: Access at By easy for Go to Though To Step VI: Access at By easy for Go Though To Step VII: Access at By easy for Though to To And Step VII is the last step for this input. After the above steps, find out in the given box the answer step for the given input.

Directions (Q. 11-16): A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement: Input: there was no light in the room Step I: was there no light in the room Step II: was there the no light in room Step III: was there room no light in Since the words are already arranged, the machine stops after this step. Otherwise the machine may carry on its logic until the words get fully arranged. Study the logic and answer the questions that follow:

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Input: story pet around on was He at Which of the following will be Step IV for the given input? 1) around at For He on was story 2) around at For He on story was 3) around at He story on was 4) around at He For on story 5) None of these

choices.a: around at For He on was story
choices.b: around at For He on story was
choices.c: around at He story on was
choices.d: around at He For on story

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Input: very no peace Which of the following steps would be ten and every for peace? 1) I 2) II 3) IV 4) V 5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Input: Together over series on feast do go Which of the following series will be the last but one? 1) I 2) III 3) V 4) V 5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Input: Over Go for through at one Which step number will be the last step of the above input? 1) II 2) V 3) VI 4) VII 5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The step II of an input is as follows: and pet to not that Which of the following would definitely be the input? 1) Do not pet to not that 2) Do pet to not that 3) Do not pet to on that 4) Cannot be determined 5) None of these

choices.a: Do not pet to not that
choices.c: Do not pet to on that

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following will be the Step II for the input given below? Input: a poet knows the meaning of night 1) the poet a knows meaning of night 2) the a poet knows meaning of night

choices.a: the poet a knows meaning of night
choices.b: the a poet knows meaning of night
